goal: Replace LLM vision pass with CV pipeline for number_stories and fenestration_per from facade photos

children.description: Canny/Sobel horizontal gradient → 1D row profile → peak detection → story count

attempts.action: min_dist=12% facade height; adaptive threshold INV for fenestration
failure_modes: decorative cornices fire as peaks at 12% spacing
inverted thresh finds mortar joints not windows on brick facades

children.description: Sobel-Y profile → Hanning window → rfft → score bins N=[2,8]. Correctly identified 112 State=5 (bin-5 dominant) but failed for simple buildings (DC step at y=0 made bin-1 overwhelm floor-pitch bins).

attempts.action: Sobel-Y + Hanning window + fft score bins [2,8]
failure_modes: DC step at facade top makes bin-1 dominant for 100 Main/27 Langdon/40 Main
Brick texture at 47px makes bin-8 dominant for 54 Elm

children.description: Row-mean brightness profile + σ=20px + poly3 detrend + fft N=[3,7]. Fixed DC contamination but lost 112 State's floor-edge signal.

failure_modes: 112 State: brightness+smoothing loses arch-crown edge signal
27 Langdon: photo(81) gives N=4 by thin margin → median=3.5→4

children.description: Sobel-Y + σ=20px smooth + poly3 detrend + rfft N=[3,7]. GOAL NODE: 4/5 stories, 9.2pp fenestration MAE.

attempts.notes: σ=20 suppresses 47px brick texture (→3%), keeps 127px floor pitch (→61%). poly3 detrend removes DC step. Fails only on 112 State (93px pitch attenuated to 40% < 155px N=3 component at 72%).

children.description: SegFormer-b0 ADE20K window segmentation → cluster centroids → stories; mask area → fenestration

failure_modes: 95.3% classified as 'building', 0% as 'windowpane'. Domain shift fatal — ADE20K window label not trained on 19th-c. commercial masonry arched windows.

children.description: Detect known-size reference object (door ~2.1m) → px/m scale → facade height / 3.5m per story
1D autocorrelation of horizontal edge profile → dominant floor period T → stories = facade_height / T

attempts.action: ACF argmax in [10%, 82%] range of facade height
failure_modes: ACF argmax finds 38px brick texture period not 130px floor-pitch period. Global argmax is always the wrong peak when multiple periodicities exist.

children.description: 35th-percentile threshold on CLAHE facade ROI → dark blobs → filter min/max dimension → cluster y-centroids with gap% → story rows = stories; blob area / facade area = fenestration

attempts.notes: Tied LLM baseline (3/5). Hard ceiling at 3/5: 112 State blobs chain into 1 row (spandrels < 56px); 54 Elm/27 Langdon singleton-row tradeoff.

children.description: H5 + top-margin filter: drop blobs with centroid_y < 9% of facade_h before clustering. Removes 54 Elm cornice (4%) but also removes 40 Main legitimate top blobs (5-7%). Net: different 3/5, no gain.

failure_modes: 54 Elm fixed but 40 Main broken (median [3,2]=2.5→2). Parameter spaces overlap — can't distinguish 4% cornice from 5-7% legitimate top blobs.

children.description: Same H5 blobs, but project onto 1D row occupancy (occ[y] = sum blob widths at row y). Connected runs of occ>0 rows ≥ MIN_RUN_FRAC = stories.

failure_modes: 112 State + 27 Langdon photo 80: spandrel bands have nonzero occ from mortar fragments → entire facade = one continuous run
54 Elm: cornice run height 27px ≥ 6% of 450px → counted as story

children.description: Width-gated occupancy: occ[y] ≥ 10% facade_w required for 'occupied'. Tested — 10% threshold is too strict for narrow windows; 40 Main/100 Main windows are only 8-13% of facade width.

failure_modes: 10% threshold filters real windows on small facades (40 Main, 100 Main)
112 State still 1 run (arcade blobs too wide/dense for any width threshold to create gaps)
